fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 60. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 59.

suffering_zones: Florida Heat Build: Midday October warmth amplifies 800 ft rolling gain over 82 miles, testing hydration on exposed scrub roads.
Lake Country Rollers: Repeated short climbs through orange groves near Sebring sap legs in the final 30 miles.
Pacing Pressure: Competitive 1000-rider field on police-escorted pave demands early discipline to hit age group qualifiers.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic, accessible late-season Florida road race with qualifier perks.

youtube_data.search_query: GFNY Florida Sebring gran fondo cycling Sebring

videos.title: Why GFNY chose Sebring Florida to do its Gran Fondo?
videos.description:
Usually, in my videos, I'm doing a ride, but not this one. Actually, I did a ride, but not the GFNY Sebring Florida Gran Fondo. Confused? I explain that in the video.

Follow Me ⬇️⬇️⬇️
🚴🏼 STRAVA | https://www.strava.com/athletes/1132250

——————————————————————————————-

https://gfny.com

videos.title: GFNY Sebring Florida - What should you know!
videos.description:
One more year at the GFNY Sebring Florida guys. If you plan on doing the cycling fondo, here is what you should know.

Route: https://ridewithgps.com/routes/35922664

GFNY: https://gfny.com

videos.curation_reason: Comprehensive course preview with specific route details, recon ride footage, and practical race preparation insights.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Florida: Blazing Speeds on a Flat, Windy Course!
videos.description:
Riding my road bike on one more Gran Fondo in Florida. This GFNY race was super fast and what made it even harder was the wind.  

Follow Me ⬇️⬇️⬇️
🚴🏼 STRAVA | https://www.strava.com/athletes/1132250
📸 INSTAGRAM | https://www.instagram.com/theridexper...
🤨 FACEBOOK | https://www.facebook.com/TheRideXperi...
——————————————————————————————-

🎥 Insta360You can use the code INRICN9 to help support the channel or thought these links: 

https://store.insta360.com/product/x4?c=3395&utm_term=INRICN9

Mount: https://store.insta360.com/product/bike-computer-mount?utm_term=INRICN9

Regino Bike & Co.: http://reginobike.com
The Ride Xperience: http://theridexperience.com
Business inquiries: contact@theridexperience.com
GFNY: https://gfny.com/

videos.curation_reason: Recent first-person race experience with detailed course conditions and specific challenges like wind impact.

videos.title: GFNY Florida Sebring from inside the peloton
videos.description:
Watch what it feels like to race GFNY Florida Sebring.
florida.gfny.com
videos.curation_reason: Official race footage showing authentic peloton experience and race atmosphere during the event.

quotes.text: One thing guys it's super windy super windy I checked the wind after tomorrow early early morning it's not going to be as bad but as the morning progresses we're going to get a lot of wind so we're going to have I think a really tough day tomorrow.

You leave here from the staging area and then you ride a couple miles and then you do a loop people that are doing like the 50 mile ride will do one loop and the ones that are doing the 100 mile ride does the loop twice.

key_challenges.name: Wind Conditions
key_challenges.description: Super windy conditions during the race with side winds, headwinds and occasional tailwinds throughout the course. Wind gets worse as the morning progresses.

terrain_notes.text: Totally flat course with endless fields until the eyes can see, featuring watermelon and orange plantations with palm trees scattered throughout. Beautiful but exposed terrain.

gear_mentions.text: Riding Pirelli 5000 28mm tubeless tires on Division 55 wheels. Using 48/35 chainring with 10/36 cassette on the back.

race_day_tips.text: Learn to ride in a smaller gear and spin 90 plus RPMs during training so that when you put in a big gear mentally you still want to spend the same RPMs during the race.
You're going to have to draft a lot due to the constant wind conditions. Being in a group is essential.

additional_quotes.text: The venue is about 30 minutes from usually where you can find a nice Airbnb so this year I did something different got an RV and my first time living on NRV spending the weekend.
The course does a loop - people that are doing like the 50 mile ride will do one loop and the ones that are doing the 100 mile ride does the loop twice.

rider_intel.search_text: GFNY Florida Sebring features a totally flat 82-mile course through endless agricultural fields with watermelon and orange plantations. The main challenge is constant wind conditions that get worse as the morning progresses, including side winds, headwinds and occasional tailwinds. Riders emphasize the need to draft extensively and train with higher cadence in smaller gears. The course uses a loop format where 50-mile riders do one loop and longer distance riders repeat it twice. The venue is located about 30 minutes from typical Airbnb accommodations. Weather is described as perfect for riding with temperatures in the 60-70 degree range. The terrain is beautifully scenic but completely exposed with palm trees scattered throughout the flat landscape. About 500 riders participate in this tier 2 event.
